topics.title: Richard Christie Bikini Waxing
topics.summary: The show features listeners and guests reacting to a segment of Richard Christie undergoing a bikini wax, discussing his physical reactions and the humorous nature of the footage.

topics.title: Dick Cheney Hunting Incident and Wayne Gretzky Gambling
topics.summary: The studio discusses reports of Dick Cheney accidentally shooting a companion during a hunting trip and the news regarding Wayne Gretzky’s significant gambling losses in Las Vegas.

topics.title: Celebrity Gambling and Oprah Fan Loyalty
topics.summary: The studio discusses the high-stakes gambling habits of athletes like Wayne Gretzky and Michael Jordan before transitioning to a social experiment regarding the unwavering loyalty of Oprah Winfrey fans.

topics.title: Oprah Winfrey and Celebrity Rumors
topics.summary: The show features a series of segments discussing the public persona of Oprah Winfrey, rumors regarding her personal life, and various celebrity speculations.

topics.title: Valentina Vaughn Interview
topics.summary: The studio hosts an interview with adult film actress Valentina Vaughn to discuss her career, upcoming projects, and specific scenes from her latest production.

topics.title: Valentina Vaughn and the Symbian Machine
topics.summary: The studio features a segment where Valentina Vaughn discusses her career in adult film, her personal life, and experiences using a vibrating device called the Symbian.

topics.title: Promotional Negotiation and Massage Segment

topics.title: Valentina Vaughn and Promotional Film Segment
topics.summary: The studio features a guest appearance by Valentina Vaughn, who performs on equipment while promoting her upcoming film and participates in various interactive segments with the host.

topics.title: Meeting with Bill Clinton
topics.summary: The studio features a detailed recount of a producer's visit to Bill Clinton’s office in Harlem, including descriptions of the president's charisma and the memorabilia found within his workspace.

topics.title: Willie Nelson's New Song
topics.summary: The studio reacts to a new Willie Nelson track about cowboys and discusses various topics including sports commentary, celebrity sightings, and listener feedback.

topics.title: Teacher's Use of Slurs and Comedy Sketches
topics.summary: The show features a news segment regarding a teacher's use of the n-word, followed by a series of comedic phone calls and musical segments.

topics.title: Music Review and Show Previews
topics.summary: The studio explores a variety of musical tracks by artists like Donovan and Cat Stevens before transitioning to discuss upcoming segments featuring guest appearances and news updates.

topics.title: Shark Attacks and Comic Book Values
topics.summary: The show covers reports of shark attacks on the Gold Coast, the high market value of vintage comic books, and the risks associated with investing in collectibles.

topics.title: Pop Culture and Political Commentary
topics.summary: The studio explores a variety of topics including comic book plotlines, the public image of Dick Cheney, Wayne Gretzky’s gambling issues, and a listener's story about school disciplinary policies.

topics.title: Celebrity News and Pop Culture Commentary
topics.summary: The show covers a variety of topics including school disciplinary issues, the autopsy results for Chris Penn, upcoming television appearances by Paula Abdul, celebrity real estate moves in France, and Lou Ferrigno's new role as a reserve deputy sheriff.
